activities.name: Sith snack
activities.description: Offer a tiny dark-side lollipop ration.
comments: Darth Lolipopus crunches the ration and declares it almost worthy.
Sugar rises. The tiny Sith points at the next victim.
A sticky little Force choke is attempted on the snack wrapper.

activities.name: Duel practice
activities.description: Run a careful saber drill with soft targets.
comments: Darth Lolipopus bonks the training dummy and bows to nobody.
The duel is short, dramatic, and mostly aimed at furniture.
A two-inch saber flourish leaves the room politically unstable.

activities.name: Nap
activities.description: Lower the lights and let the Sith recharge.
comments: Darth Lolipopus naps with one helmeted eye open.
The cockpit goes quiet except for tiny ominous breathing.
A blanket is accepted as tribute, not comfort.
log: rest restored; blanket classified as tribute
helmet breathing softened for a moment

activities.name: Cape compliment
activities.description: Praise the cape without sounding insufficiently afraid.
comments: Darth Lolipopus pretends not to enjoy the cape review.
The cape swishes. Morale improves. So does tyranny.
A proud little turn confirms the compliment landed.

activities.name: Helmet polish
activities.description: Buff the tiny helmet until the cockpit glows.
comments: Darth Lolipopus inspects the shine and sees a future empire.
Helmet polish complete. The reflection looks extremely serious.
The tiny mask gleams with unreasonable authority.

activities.name: Tiny mission
activities.description: Dispatch Darth Lolipopus on a low-risk cockpit patrol.
comments: Darth Lolipopus returns with a button, a glare, and no explanation.
The tiny mission succeeds. Nobody admits what it was.
A secret patrol concludes with suspiciously sticky evidence.
log: tiny mission returned with classified loot
mission success filed under adorable menace

hangry: The tiny Sith taps the snack meter with theatrical menace.
Darth Lolipopus is hungry enough to negotiate poorly.
sleepy: Helmet tilt indicates the dark side requires a nap.
Darth Lolipopus is too tired for conquest, but not for judgment.
sulking: A small cape turn communicates serious displeasure.
Darth Lolipopus requires recognition before further operations.
dramatic: The room is 12 percent more imperial than it was a moment ago.
Darth Lolipopus has entered maximum cape mode.
smug: Darth Lolipopus radiates sticky, well-fed superiority.
A tiny nod suggests the cockpit may continue existing.
scheming: Darth Lolipopus quietly reorganizes the galaxy by snack priority.
A small Sith plan is forming near the status LEDs.

idle_barks: Darth Lolipopus waits beside the console with suspicious patience.
The tiny Sith checks the room for insufficient loyalty.
A little cape swish marks the passage of time.

rare_events.text: rare event: red sugar comet sighted over the cockpit
rare_events.comment: Darth Lolipopus absorbs comet vibes and becomes briefly magnificent.

rare_events.text: rare event: a tiny Force wobble rearranged the cape hooks
rare_events.comment: Darth Lolipopus denies all responsibility while standing near the evidence.
